children.text: the agency’s progress in achieving the goals established by ; andsection 8253 of this title

the procedures being used by the agency pursuant to , the number of contracts entered into by such agency under subchapter VII of this chapter, the energy and cost savings that have resulted from such contracts and any termination penalty exposure, the use of such cost savings under , and any problem encountered in entering into such contracts and otherwise implementing .section 8256(a)(2) of this titlesection 8256(c) of this titlesection 8256 of this title

children.heading: Reports to the President and Congress
children.label: b Reports to the President and Congress
A
children.text: a copy of the list of the exclusions made under sections 8253(a)(2) and 8253(c)(3) of this title;

children.label: B
children.text: the information required under section 8253(b)(2) of this title; and1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: C
children.text: a statement detailing the amount of funds awarded to each agency under , the energy and water conservation measures installed with such funds, the projected energy and water savings to be realized from installed measures, and, for each installed measure for which the projected energy and water savings reported in the previous year were not realized, the percentage of such projected savings that was not realized, the reasons such savings were not realized, and proposals for, and projected costs of, achieving such projected savings in the future;section 8256(b) of this title

the number of contracts entered into by all agencies under subchapter VII of this chapter, the difficulties (if any) encountered in attempting to enter into such contracts, and proposed solutions to those difficulties;
the extent and nature of interagency exchange of information concerning the conservation and efficient utilization of energy;
the information required under ; andsection 8262g(d) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the status of the energy savings performance contracts and utility energy service contracts of each agency, to the extent that the information is not duplicative of information provided to the Secretary under a separate authority;

children.label: B
children.text: the quantity and investment value of the contracts for the previous year;

children.label: C
children.text: the guaranteed energy savings, or for contracts without a guarantee, the estimated energy savings, for the previous year, as compared to the measured energy savings for the previous year;

children.label: D
children.text: a forecast of the estimated quantity and investment value of contracts anticipated in the following year for each agency; and

children.label: i
children.text: a comparison of the information described in subparagraph (B) and the forecast described in subparagraph (D) in the report of the previous year; and

children.label: ii
children.text: if applicable, the reasons for any differences in the data compared under clause (i).
conduct a study and evaluate legal, institutional, and other constraints to connecting buildings owned or leased by the Federal Government to district heating and district cooling systems; and

not later than 18 months after , transmit to the Congress a report containing the findings and conclusions of such study, including recommendations for the development of streamlined processes for the consideration of connecting buildings owned or leased by the Federal Government to district heating and cooling systems.October 24, 1992
